Correction to the Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the Deposit Anywhere pricing in multiple sections of the Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725. The fees published on December 30, 2021, inadvertently showed a price increase when there was no actual change to the 2021 fees.
